system.description:
Controlling and using boats and ships, including navigation.
  • Plotting a faster course to shave time off a long voyage: Watercraft/EDU 10+
  • Maintaining a vessel to keep it seaworthy: Watercraft/INT 8+
  • Predicting a coming storm: Watercraft/EDU 12+
  • Navigating rapids, shoals, or other dangerous waters: Watercraft/DEX 10+
system.shortdescr: Controlling boats and ships, navigation, and seamanship.
